=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================

Bob Dylan
April 24 1997 
Stanley Performing Arts Center  
Utica, New York

Lineage: audio cd-r's > EAC (Secure, Offset Correct)  WAV > TLH-FLAC (8)


Disk One
01-Absolutely Sweet Marie (5:51)
02-Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power) (6:37)
03-All Along The Watchtower (6:56)
04-Simple Twist Of Fate (9:14)
05-I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (7:53)
06-Silvio (8:09)
07-Roving Gambler (acoustic w band) (4:36)
08-Masters Of War (acoustic w band) (6:42)
09-Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic w band) (11:24)

67:22

Disk Two
01-Seeing The Real You At Last (7:37)
02-Never Gonna Be The Same Again (7:05)
03-Highway 61 Revisited (10:56)
04-I Shall Be Released (8:17)
05-My Back Pages (acoustic w band) (11:32)
06-Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 (7:12)

52:39
